title: Erica elgonensis

This family is commonly known as the heath family and is composed of a wide range of species, including heath, heather, and cranberry. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including the reduction of inflammation, improvement of cardiovascular health, and antioxidant activity.
